channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two gas cannisters, fridge and wheelbarrow, 21st July
item.description:
Neighbour from Number 2 Randall Place paved the outside of front door and threw all her rubbish across the road on council land - Two gas cannisters - very dangerous!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The sweeping on has not been done on Windsor Terr the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not done., 21st July
item.description:
The sweeping on has not been done on Windsor Terr the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not done.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windsor Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various unknown items dumped by 51 Firs Close, 21st July
item.description:
Various unknown items dumped by 51 Firs Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Firs Close, Honor Oak, Greater London

item.title: The sweeping on has not been done on Micawber Road the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not, 21st July
item.description:
The sweeping on has not been done on Micawber Road the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wenlock Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Glass on grass, 21st July
item.description:
Glass on the green triangle on danson Road, dangerous for dogs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Grove, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: The sweeping on has not been done on Thornby Road the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not cleaned to the same standard as City Road., 21st July
item.description:
The sweeping on has not been done Thornby Road the area behind the McDonald's along the street is dirty and that the Windsor Terrace is filthy and covered in rubbish, bottles and cans. She states that the side roads are being overlooked and not cleaned to

item.title: Sofa near back garden gates, 21st July
item.description:
Dumped outside garden gates at the back of farrington avenue between number 5 and 7 since fa dumped on green area along with other rubbish been there few days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selwyn Place, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in alleyway next to 1 Woodbine Road, 21st July
item.description:
This fly tip has been there for 2 weeks now, i witnessed it happen and have CCTV footage of the residents doing it. Bags have now been ripped open by wildlife and now all over the ground and causing rats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pile of debris on left has been on the road for 2 months now, 21st July
item.description:
Road was obstructed and the debris has been in place for 2 months . My road is maintained by the residents and there is mess everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hill Brow, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street only cleared on one side of Heathland Road N16, 21st July
item.description:
One side of Heathland Road N16 was cleaned. The other side not and rubbish and litter all down the street - paper, plastic, tissues

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp is faulty, 21st July
item.description:
Light keeps turning on and off rapidly throughout the night.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wenlock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by neighbours, 21st July
item.description:
No 7 Dalston lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter & vegetation needs cutting, 21st July
item.description:
The vegetation (weeds, bushes, tree branches) could do with cutting back on the grass verge, near the play area at Rookery Gardens. Some litter is in the same area that should be removed. May also be some litter on the concrete area next to the play area. If so please remove the litter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5A, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedgerow cutting, 21st July
item.description:
Second request. The hedgerows need to re reduced to a safety level of no more than 1.2m. In height. Currently nearly 4m. It is dangerous to exit driveways as vision is totally obscured by overgrown vegetation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant fedar pillar needs removing, 21st July
item.description:
Feeder pillar no longer in use

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Slip, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath drains, 21st July
item.description:
Drains not on map. Various path drains never cleared. These need to be added to map and cleaned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree resting on light, 21st July
item.description:
Tree is covering light 2nd column
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Slip, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part of old sign needs removing, 21st July
item.description:
Very old temporary sign was here in 2015 But parts are still there. Looks awful and needs removing. 75C 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown vegetation., 21st July
item.description:
Footpath unusable due to over grown vegetation. people have to walk in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ripley Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ground subsidence and shifting boundary wall., 21st July
item.description:
The public footpath/alleyway shows signs of shifting/subsidence of ground as it has developed several vertical and horizontal cracks. The residential property boundary wall next to it has shifted and could potentially be dangerous and cause public safety hazard - people regularly use this path to walk and ride on motor bike.

Report on FixMyStreet
